message:
fix(codegen): Fix unittest.skipUnless allocator, @intCast, and bytearray

Fixes 3 of 5 @core2 compilation errors:

1. **unittest.skipUnless allocator parameter** (FIXED)
   - Added UnittestFuncMeta to import_registry.zig
   - Marks skip/skipIf/skipUnless/expectedFailure as no_alloc=true
   - Prevents codegen from adding allocator as first parameter
   - unittest.skipUnless now correctly generates 2 args instead of 3

2. **@intCast without result type in os.stat** (FIXED)
   - Wrapped all @intCast calls in os.zig genStat with @as
   - Changed: @intCast(_stat.size) → @as(i64, @intCast(_stat.size))
   - Same for st_mode (u32), st_mtime/atime/ctime (i64)
   - Fixes Zig 0.15 requirement for explicit result types

3. **bytearray undeclared in comprehensions** (FIXED)
   - Added special case for bytearray in comprehensions.zig
   - Generates: blk_ba: { const _n = @intCast(arg); const _buf = alloc...; }
   - Handles [bytearray(i) for i in range(n)] patterns

Remaining: 2 more complex issues (nested blk labels, unused cls)
